examples: I am not a man to equivocate.
I'm not a man to equivocate.
She seemed to equivocate on some things like whether illegal immigrants should be able to get driver's licenses.
Not once did Ms. Currie equivocate on the central fact Ms. Lewinsky asked her to retrieve the gifts.
"I am not one of those who believe we should moderate, equivocate or otherwise abandon our principles, " Jindal said.
